creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: kevlo
Date: Wed Nov 13 06:09:26 2013
New Revision: 333652
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/333652

Log:
  - Update to 0.8
  - Add stage support
  
  PR:	ports/183909
  Submitted by:	Kevin Zheng <kevinz5000 at gmail dot com>

Modified:
  head/devel/deheader/Makefile
  head/devel/deheader/distinfo

Modified: head/devel/deheader/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/deheader/Makefile	Wed Nov 13 05:55:57 2013	(r333651)
+++ head/devel/deheader/Makefile	Wed Nov 13 06:09:26 2013	(r333652)
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	deheader
-PORTVERSION=	0.7
+PORTVERSION=	0.8
 CATEGORIES=	devel
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.catb.org/esr/deheader/
 
@@ -14,13 +14,10 @@ LICENSE_FILE=	${WRKSRC}/COPYING
 NO_BUILD=	yes
 USE_PYTHON=	yes
 
-MAN1=		deheader.1
+PLIST_FILES=	bin/deheader man/man1/deheader.1.gz
 
-PLIST_FILES=	bin/deheader
-
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 do-install:
-	${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKSRC}/deheader ${PREFIX}/bin
-	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/deheader.1 ${PREFIX}/man/man1
+	${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKSRC}/deheader ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/bin
+	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/deheader.1 ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/man/man1
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/devel/deheader/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/deheader/distinfo	Wed Nov 13 05:55:57 2013	(r333651)
+++ head/devel/deheader/distinfo	Wed Nov 13 06:09:26 2013	(r333652)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (deheader-0.7.tar.gz) = dfa82417f68d15759b47fe3440e9842595393776a8666f4a3f43c1d06766434f
-SIZE (deheader-0.7.tar.gz) = 22388
+SHA256 (deheader-0.8.tar.gz) = a7427455d291b8ce9ba2cd70f2b6d482318149e4f2a14a5103e393286d8bf26b
+SIZE (deheader-0.8.tar.gz) = 22645
